case_title: KRISTEN O'HANLON VS. GARY D. FRIEDMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-11-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ATTACHED TO CASE FILE AND ENDORSED COPIES OF MOTION TO VACATE SENT TO ALL PARTIES) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY D. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GARY D. FRIEDMAN SET FOR JUN-20-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN 506.
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY D.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF O'HANLON, KRISTEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT HEARING IS "GRANTED". HEARING DATE IS CHANGED TO: JUN-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'HANLON, KRISTEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY D. ALTHOUGH THE COURT ACKKNOWLEDGES THAT PLAINITFF HAS RESIDUAL SCARS FROM THE MEDICAL PROCEDURE, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THROUGH EXPERT TESTIMONY THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT CARE WAS BELOW THE PREVAILING STANDARD OF CARE, OR THAT THE SCARS ARE NOT A POSSIBLE OR ACCEPTABLE RISK OF THE PROCEDURE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
